selections.name: Royal Maximus (NZ)
selections.reason: Waller-trained gelding who placed on a heavy track at Ballarat. Ready to peak third-up.

selections.name: Tagalaon
selections.reason: Consistent form with two placings from three starts. Handles soft going and maps well.

selections.name: Pari Moi
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten on a slow track at Geelong last start. Fit and ready to strike.

selections.name: Colizzi (NZ)
selections.reason: Placed on a slow track at Geelong when resuming. Will strip fitter and appreciate the conditions.

danger_horse.name: Bank Heist (GB)
danger_horse.reason: Runner-up on a heavy track at Moe last start. Proven mudlark who must be respected.

selections.name: Jenni Poppins
selections.reason: Promising filly who was runner-up on a heavy track at Pakenham. Looks ready to break her maiden.

selections.name: Expanding Power
selections.reason: Placed on a heavy track at Moe when resuming. Fitter now and handles the conditions.

selections.name: Tisseyre
selections.reason: Set the pace and placed on a soft track at Cranbourne. Will be prominent for a long way.

selections.name: Nedhammer Hen
selections.reason: Solid debut when third on a wet track at Moe. Open to natural improvement.

danger_horse.name: Enchanted Lass (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Placed on soft going and has been racing consistently. Can figure in the finish.

selections.name: Wonboyn
selections.reason: Impressive winner on soft going at Yarra Valley before a break. Trialled well and can win fresh.

selections.name: On The Loose (NZ)
selections.reason: Broke maiden status on a slow track at Geelong. Progressive type who can take the next step.

selections.name: Off Their Perch
selections.reason: Consistent filly who placed on a slow track at Pakenham. Gets in well at the weights.

selections.name: Jetsetter Jack
selections.reason: Runner-up on a slow track at Pakenham last start. Building a solid record.

danger_horse.name: Hook 'N' Spur
danger_horse.reason: Placed on a slow track at Geelong. Has the class to be a major threat.

selections.name: Thinkyahot
selections.reason: Runner-up on a slow track at Echuca. Moody/Coleman trained and looks primed to strike.

selections.name: Zoudeadly
selections.reason: Runner-up on a heavy track at Warrnambool. Proven in the conditions and will be strong late.

selections.name: Bellabama
selections.reason: Placed on soft going and has been freshened. Capable of a bold showing.

selections.name: Highaboveme
selections.reason: Placed on heavy going at Echuca. Gains a start and has claims in an open race.

danger_horse.name: Queens Of Vino
danger_horse.reason: Placed on soft going and has trialled well. Can surprise at odds.

selections.name: Winchester
selections.reason: Proven on heavy going and has been trialling well. Can run a big race fresh.

selections.name: Hollywoodboulevard (NZ)
selections.reason: Consistent gelding who won on soft going before a break. Class runner of the field.

selections.name: Nordic Strike
selections.reason: Maher-trained gelding who has trialled well. Capable of a strong showing fresh.

selections.name: I'm Cheeky
selections.reason: Veteran who handles wet tracks well. Can sneak into the placings at odds.

danger_horse.name: Bella Cinque
danger_horse.reason: Has form on soft going and trialled well recently. Keep safe.

selections.name: Capricorn Star
selections.reason: Classy mare with a win and a placing on heavy tracks. Top weight but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Princess Mess
selections.reason: Won on a heavy track at Wangaratta. Loves the wet and maps to get a great run.

selections.name: She's A Con (NZ)
selections.reason: Has a win and two placings on heavy tracks. Proven mudlark who will relish the conditions.

selections.name: Chocolate Box
selections.reason: Consistent mare with form on soft going. Can figure in the finish with the right run.

danger_horse.name: Korobeiniki
danger_horse.reason: Has placed on heavy tracks and can improve on recent form.

selections.name: Red On Red
selections.reason: Absolute mudlark with 4 wins on heavy tracks. Won on heavy going at Sandown last start. The one to beat.

selections.name: Stay Silent
selections.reason: Placed on a heavy track and has strong soft track form. Will be competitive.

selections.name: Garnacho (NZ)
selections.reason: Placed on heavy going and has been racing consistently. Can run into the money.

selections.name: Lottaroc (NZ)
selections.reason: Has a win on heavy going and will appreciate the drop in class.

danger_horse.name: Gallant Prince
danger_horse.reason: Placed on heavy going and has been racing well. Can surprise.

selections.name: Golden Hips
selections.reason: Proven mudlark with 3 wins on heavy tracks. Will relish the conditions and looks a strong winning chance.

selections.name: Perfuse (GB)
selections.reason: Has a win on heavy going and will find this easier than recent assignments.

selections.name: Hard To Go Wrong
selections.reason: Has won twice on soft going and can handle the step up in trip.

selections.name: Zeaction (NZ)
selections.reason: Won on soft going and has been racing consistently. Can figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Grand Sage
danger_horse.reason: Placed on soft going and gains a start. Can add value to exotics.
